name: Warm Radicchio Cheese Puddles
recipeIngredient: 6 large radicchio leaves, rinsed and dried
3 ounces Teleme or Jack cheese, cut into 1/4-inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the olive oil and lemon juice.
2. Brush the mixture over all sides of the radicchio leaves.
3. Place the leaves, cut side up, in a 9x13-inch baking dish.
4. Distribute an equal portion of cheese evenly among each radicchio cup.
5. Sprinkle with freshly ground pepper.
6. Bake at 350°F for 4-6 minutes, or until the cheese melts.
7. Serve hot or warm.
